name: quant-research-mcp
description: Paper-backed quant trading methods + a deterministic, no-LLM decision helper. Read-only research tooling — not financial advice.
long_description: An MCP server exposing a registry of paper-backed quantitative trading methods (Hurst-regime ORB, RSI-2 reversion, Donchian trend, cross-sectional momentum, pairs cointegration) plus a deterministic decision helper, backtesting, event-risk checks, portfolio heat, and market context. The server supplies reproducible math; the calling agent supplies judgement. No LLM, no subprocess, no orders.
